# Requirements Template

## Purpose

Use this template to describe what the system must do and which constraints it must satisfy.

## Template Body

```md
# Requirements: <Title>

Status: Draft | Active | Archived

## Scope

Level: Container | Direction: <name> | Service: <name>

Describe what this requirements document covers.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or need.

## Actors

- <Actor and goal>

## Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Priority |
| --- | --- | --- |
| REQ-0001 | <Requirement> | Must |

## Non-Functional Requirements

- <Reliability, security, performance, usability, compliance, or operational requirement>

## Business Rules

- <Rule>

## Acceptance Criteria

- <Criterion>

## Out of Scope

- <Explicit exclusion>

## Dependencies

- <Dependency>

## Related Design Docs

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)

## Related Open Questions

- [<Open questions>](<relative-link>)
```
